DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INSPECTION DEMANDS -- PETER BRESLER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:IS GRANTED. THE RESPONSES WERE TIMELY MADE AND HAVE NOT BEEN WAIVED, BUT THE OBJECTIONS HAVE NO MERIT. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/EAHEWLETT)
REPLY BRIEF RE MTN FOR DISCO TERMINATING SANCTION & MONETARY SANCTION FILED BY DEFENDANT PHAN, AILE

DISCOVERY, 612, PRESENT: GERARD D. LAUNAY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, AILE PHAN. MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. COURT REPORTER: STEPHANIE CRUZ. MOTION ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR DISCOVERY TERMINATING SANCTION AND MONETARY SANCTION IS DENIED. THE PREVIOUS RULING HELD THAT OBJECTIONS HAD NOT BEEN WAIVED. THE COURT WILL NOT MAKE A RULING ON THE PRIVACY OBJECTIONS ON THIS MOTION. MOVING PARTY HAS NOT ADDRESSED THE MERITS OF THE PRIVACY OBJECTIONS, AND THE COURT MAKES NO FINDINGS ON THOSE OBJECTIONS AT THIS TIME. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY OF SUBPOENAED WITNESS AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. AS THE DEPOSITION SEEKS TESTIMONY REGARDING FAYE LEE'S ACTIONS AND COMMUNICATIONS WITH PLAINTIFFS, IF ANY. BY THIS ORDER, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT PRIVILEGES HAVE BEEN WAIVED AS TO COMMUNICATIONS NOT HAD IN THE PRESENCE OF PLAINTIFFS. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
